All Implemented Interfaces:

    • CacheHypothesisComposite

      public CacheHypothesisComposite(IUserSupport userSupport, ProverUI proverUI)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      userSupport - the User Support associated with this cached hypothesis composite.
      proverUI - the main prover editor associated with this cached hypothesis composite.

    • createItems

      public void createItems(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.ToolBar toolBar)
      Description copied from class: HypothesisComposite
      Abstract method for create different items within the top tool bar.
      Specified by:
      createItems in class HypothesisComposite
      Parameters:
      toolBar - the parent tool bar where different items to be created.

    • getHypotheses

      public Iterable<Predicate> getHypotheses(IProofState ps)
      Description copied from class: HypothesisComposite
      Abstract method to get the list of hypotheses. Clients implement this method to return the appropriate hypotheses which will be displayed, e.g. Searched Hypotheses or Cached Hypotheses.
      Specified by:
      getHypotheses in class HypothesisComposite
      Parameters:
      ps - a proof state
      Returns:
      a collection of hypotheses as an Iterable.
